qa_pairs.question: What was the reference database size in run 2 of the character counting experiment?
In run 2 of the character counting experiment, what was the block read size?
How many GNU Parallel jobs were executed in run 2?
How many cores were used in run 2 of the character counting experiment?
What was the time taken to count characters in run 2?
In run 3 of the character counting task, how many cores were in the task?
qa_pairs.answer: There were 8 cores in the task.

qa_pairs.question: What was the reference database size for run 3?
What was the block read size set to for run 3?
How many GNU Parallel jobs were dispatched during run 3?
How many cores were actually utilized in run 3?
What was the character counting time for run 3?
How many cores were in the task for run 4 of the character counting experiment?
qa_pairs.answer: There were 8 cores in the task.
